violations.text: There was an accumulation of old droppings underneath equipment that has not been in use for about a year. Establishment to continue cleaning of facility. Per PIC, establishment is hiring professional cleaning company to clean entire facility. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by large accumulation of droppings in the dry storage area. Floors and equipment were observed with droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment to have pest control treat facility. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
The handsinks in bars 1 and 2 were unable to reach at least 100 degrees. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
